title: Panevėžys, Panevėžys County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Panevėžys, Panevėžys County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Panevėžys is a city in Panevėžys County with a population of 92,000. A city in northern Lithuania, known for its theater and cultural scene, the Cido Arena, and a strong industrial and manufacturing heritage.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
